title: Delete sub-item when done Automation?
excerpt: I do not know if this is possible and I cannot find anything about it.

posts.author: ron-CBAS (Ronesto)
posts.cookedHtml: I do not know if this is possible and I cannot find anything about it.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ron-CBAS

We recently launched a new app on marketplace called “Automate Subitems” which has a recipe “When status changes to something, delete all subitems”. It would perfectly solve your use case. Get it from here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Thanks

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ron-CBAS

Screenshot 2024-06-17 at 17.41.292042×490 30.9 KB

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ron-CBAS ,
